behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert on specific file paths like 'src/infra/exec-inline-eval.ts' and 'src/infra/exec-approvals-allowlist.ts' (in test_no_ts_nocheck, test_no_any_type_annotations, etc.), and function names like 'isInterpreterLikeAllowlistPattern' (test_allowlist_imports_interpreter_check). An alternative correct implementation could use a differently-named function or inline the check, and would fail this test.
